en: At that time Abijah the son of Jeroboam fell sick.
zh: 那時，耶羅波安的兒子亞比雅病了。

en: And Jeroboam said to his wife, "Arise, and disguise yourself, that it not be known that you are the wife of Jeroboam, and go to Shiloh. Behold, Ahijah the prophet is there, who said of me that I should be king over this people.
zh: 耶羅波安對他的妻子說：“你起來改裝，使人認不出你是耶羅波安的妻子。到示羅去，有亞希雅先知在那裡，他曾對我說，我必作這民的王。

en: Take with you ten loaves, some cakes, and a jar of honey, and go to him. He will tell you what shall happen to the child."
zh: 你要帶十個餅，一些餅乾和一瓶蜜去見他，他會告訴你孩子將要怎樣。”

en: Jeroboam's wife did so. She arose and went to Shiloh and came to the house of Ahijah. Now Ahijah could not see, for his eyes were dim because of his age.
zh: 耶羅波安的妻子就這樣行了。她動身往示羅去，到了亞希雅的家；亞希雅因為年紀老邁，眼睛昏花，不能看見。

en: And the LORD said to Ahijah, "Behold, the wife of Jeroboam is coming to inquire of you concerning her son, for he is sick. Thus and thus shall you say to her." When she came, she pretended to be another woman.
zh: 耶和華對亞希雅說：“看哪，耶羅波安的妻子要來向你求問關於她兒子的事，因為他病了。你要這樣這樣告訴她。她進來的時候，必裝作別的婦人。”

en: But when Ahijah heard the sound of her feet, as she came in at the door, he said, "Come in, wife of Jeroboam. Why do you pretend to be another? For I am charged with unbearable news for you.
zh: 她剛進門的時候，亞希雅就聽見她的腳步聲，就說：“耶羅波安的妻子啊！進來吧！你為甚麼要這樣改裝呢？我奉差派要把凶信告訴你。

en: Go, tell Jeroboam, 'Thus says the LORD, the God of Israel: "Because I exalted you from among the people and made you leader over my people Israel
zh: 你去告訴耶羅波安：‘耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：我從人民中提拔了你，又立了你作治理我的子民以色列的領袖。

en: and tore the kingdom away from the house of David and gave it to you, and yet you have not been like my servant David, who kept my commandments and followed me with all his heart, doing only that which was right in my eyes,
zh: 我把國從大衛家奪過來，賞賜給你；你卻不像我僕人大衛那樣謹守我的誡命，一心跟從我，行我看為正的事。

en: but you have done evil above all who were before you and have gone and made for yourself other gods and metal images, provoking me to anger, and have cast me behind your back,
zh: 你反倒行惡，比那些在你以前的更壞；又去為自己製造了別的神和鑄造偶像惹我發怒，把我丟在背後。

en: therefore behold, I will bring harm upon the house of Jeroboam and will cut off from Jeroboam every male, both bond and free in Israel, and will burn up the house of Jeroboam, as a man burns up dung until it is all gone.
zh: 因此，我必使災禍臨到耶羅波安的家；我必剪除以色列中所有屬於耶羅波安的男丁，無論是自由的或是不自由的；我必剷除耶羅波安的家，像人掃除糞土一樣，直到完全除盡為止。

en: Anyone belonging to Jeroboam who dies in the city the dogs shall eat, and anyone who dies in the open country the birds of the heavens shall eat, for the LORD has spoken it."'
zh: 屬於耶羅波安的人，死在城裡的，必被狗吃掉；死在田野的，必給空中的飛鳥吃掉。因為這是耶和華說的。’

en: Arise therefore, go to your house. When your feet enter the city, the child shall die.
zh: 所以你起來，回家去吧，你的腳一進城，你的孩子就必死亡。

en: And all Israel shall mourn for him and bury him, for he only of Jeroboam shall come to the grave, because in him there is found something pleasing to the LORD, the God of Israel, in the house of Jeroboam.
zh: 以色列眾人要為他舉哀，把他埋葬；屬耶羅波安的人中，只有他可以入葬墳墓；因為在耶羅波安的家中，只有他向耶和華以色列的 神顯出善行。

en: Moreover, the LORD will raise up for himself a king over Israel who shall cut off the house of Jeroboam today. And henceforth,
zh: 耶和華必為自己興起一個王治理以色列，他必剪除耶羅波安家，今天就是時候了，就是現在！

en: the LORD will strike Israel as a reed is shaken in the water, and root up Israel out of this good land that he gave to their fathers and scatter them beyond the Euphrates, because they have made their Asherim, provoking the LORD to anger.
zh: 耶和華必擊打以色列人，他們就擺動，像蘆葦在水中擺動一樣。他要把以色列人從他賜給他們列祖的這塊美地上拔出來，把他們分散在幼發拉底河那邊，因為他們做了亞舍拉，惹耶和華發怒。

en: And he will give Israel up because of the sins of Jeroboam, which he sinned and made Israel to sin."
zh: 為了耶羅波安所犯的罪，又為了他使以色列人所犯的罪，耶和華必丟棄以色列人。”

en: Then Jeroboam's wife arose and departed and came to Tirzah. And as she came to the threshold of the house, the child died.
zh: 耶羅波安的妻子動身離去，回到得撒；她一踏進門檻，孩子就死了。

en: And all Israel buried him and mourned for him, according to the word of the LORD, which he spoke by his servant Ahijah the prophet.
zh: 以色列眾人把他埋葬了，又為他舉哀，好像耶和華藉著他的僕人亞希雅先知所說的話一樣。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Jeroboam, how he warred and how he reigned, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.
zh: 耶羅波安其餘的事蹟，他怎樣爭戰，怎樣作王，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

en: And the time that Jeroboam reigned was twenty-two years. And he slept with his fathers, and Nadab his son reigned in his place.
zh: 耶羅波安作王的日子共二十二年，就與他的列祖同睡。他的兒子拿答接續他作王。

en: Now Rehoboam the son of Solomon reigned in Judah. Rehoboam was forty-one years old when he began to reign, and he reigned seventeen years in Jerusalem, the city that the LORD had chosen out of all the tribes of Israel, to put his name there. His mother's name was Naamah the Ammonite.
zh: 所羅門的兒子羅波安在猶大作王。他登基的時候，是四十一歲；他在耶路撒冷，就是耶和華從以色列各支派中所揀選，在那裡立他名的城，作王十七年。他的母親名叫拿瑪，是亞捫人。

en: And Judah did what was evil in the sight of the LORD, and they provoked him to jealousy with their sins that they committed, more than all that their fathers had done.
zh: 猶大人行耶和華看為惡的事；他們所犯的罪，惹動他的妒忿比他們的列祖更厲害。

en: For they also built for themselves high places and pillars and Asherim on every high hill and under every green tree,
zh: 他們又為自己在各高岡上，各茂盛樹下建造邱壇、神柱和亞舍拉。

en: and there were also male cult prostitutes in the land. They did according to all the abominations of the nations that the LORD drove out before the people of Israel.
zh: 國內又有男妓，他們仿效耶和華在以色列人面前所趕出的外族人，行了一切可憎的事。

en: In the fifth year of King Rehoboam, Shishak king of Egypt came up against Jerusalem.
zh: 羅波安王第五年，埃及王示撒上來攻打耶路撒冷。

en: He took away the treasures of the house of the LORD and the treasures of the king's house. He took away everything. He also took away all the shields of gold that Solomon had made,
zh: 他奪去了耶和華的寶物和王宮的寶物，並且把所有的東西都奪去了；又把所羅門所做的一切金盾牌都奪了去。

en: and King Rehoboam made in their place shields of bronze, and committed them to the hands of the officers of the guard, who kept the door of the king's house.
zh: 羅波安王做了銅盾牌代替那些金盾牌；交給看守宮門的衛兵隊長看管。

en: And as often as the king went into the house of the LORD, the guard carried them and brought them back to the guardroom.
zh: 王每次進耶和華殿的時候，衛兵就拿著這些盾牌，隨後又把盾牌送回護衛室裡。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Rehoboam and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?
zh: 羅波安其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

en: And there was war between Rehoboam and Jeroboam continually.
zh: 羅波安與耶羅波安之間常有戰爭。

en: And Rehoboam slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David. His mother's name was Naamah the Ammonite. And Abijam his son reigned in his place.
zh: 羅波安與他的列祖同睡，與他的列祖一同埋葬在大衛的城裡。他的母親名叫拿瑪，是亞捫人；他的兒子亞比央接續他作王。
